reviews.comment:
Malísima atención! Tanto en la playa como en el fulll! Siendo cliente de YPF, está estación dejo mucho que desear! Te atienden como si te estuvieran haciendo un favor!

(Translated by Google)
Terrible service! Both at the beach and at the full station! As a YPF customer, this station leaves much to be desired! They treat you like they're doing you a favor!
reviews.name: accounts/109853746269412609224/locations/5022790591955098090/reviews/ChdDSUhNMG9nS0VJQ0FnSURCX2ZMdjlRRRAB

reviews.comment:
Un desastre. Es una picardia. Nunca tienen sistema para usar la App Ypf, no se puede pagar con tarjetas de débito o crédito, solo reciben en efectivo. Y no te cargan ni los puntos a la tarjeta si pagas en efectivo. Deben llenar el tanque en Jesús Maria y pasar derecho a santiago. Hasta que empiecen a hacer las cosas bien. No volveré a parar en ojo de agua, pasare dexho a cargar en Jesús María. En el Full, no reciben tarjetas de crédito, si efectivo y débito, pero no permiten comprar con la aplicación de ypf, tampoco cargan loa puntos.
Hay que dejar de parar en Ojo de Agua.... llenen los tanques en santiago, y en Jesús maría...

(Translated by Google)
A disaster. It's outrageous. They never have a system for using the YPF app; you can't pay with debit or credit cards, they only accept cash. And they don't even credit your points to the card if you pay in cash. You should fill up in Jesús María and go straight to Santiago. Until they start doing things right, I won't stop in Ojo de Agua again; I'll go straight to Jesús María to fill up. At the Full station, they don't accept credit cards, only cash and debit, but they don't allow purchases with the YPF app, nor do they credit the points. We have to stop stopping in Ojo de Agua... fill up in Santiago, and in Jesús María...
reviews.name: accounts/109853746269412609224/locations/5022790591955098090/reviews/ChdDSUhNMG9nS0VJQ0FnSURCbGVMSTFnRRAB

reviews.comment:
